windows.title: Terminals
windows.query: select TerminalID, MerchantID, ZIPCode, MCC, Name, NameAm, LegalName, LegalNameAm, City, Region, RegistrationAddress, RegistrationAddressAm, LocationAddress, LocationAddressAm, INN, TransactionType, BankAccount, TerminalBrand, SerialNumber, TerminalModel, DirectorName, Phone, PartnerBank, LocationClassCB, OperatorClassCB, ArcaFee, LocalFee, InternationalFee, CloseDate, OpenDate, Email from MERCHANTS order by TerminalID desc

fields.title: TerminalID
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT value_col as value, display_col as display FROM table_name WHERE parent = ?

autoValue.query: Select max(TerminalID) + 1 from MERCHANTS where substr(TerminalID,1,5) = '41043'

fields.systemVariable: sql:Select max(TerminalID) + 1 from MERCHANTS where substr(TerminalID,1,5) = '41043'

validations.query: SELECT 1 FROM MERCHANTS WHERE TerminalID=? AND MerchantID=?
validations.error: Կա Տող նույն TerminalID և MerchantID -ով:

fields.title: MCC
fields.lookupQuery: select MCCCode || ' - ' || MCC_DESC from MCC

fields.title: OurFee
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT OurFee as value, OurFee as display FROM MCC_FEES WHERE substr(?,1,4) = MCCFee

fields.title: LocalFee
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT ArcaFee as value, ArcaFee as display FROM MCC_FEES WHERE substr(?,1,4) = MCCFee

fields.title: InternationalFee
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT InternationalFee as value, InternationalFee as display FROM MCC_FEES WHERE substr(?,1,4) = MCCFee

fields.title: City
fields.lookupQuery: select CityName from CITIES

fields.title: Region
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DistrictName as value, DistrictName as display FROM DISTRICTS WHERE ? = 'Երևան' UNION ALL SELECT RegionName as value, RegionName as display FROM REGIONS WHERE ? != 'Երևան'

fields.title: LegalName
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT(LegalName) as value FROM MERCHANTS WHERE ? = MerchantID

fields.title: LegalNameAm
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT(LegalNameAm) as value FROM MERCHANTS WHERE ? = MerchantID

fields.title: RegistrationAddress
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT(RegistrationAddress) as value FROM MERCHANTS WHERE ? = MerchantID

fields.title: RegistrationAddressAm
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT(RegistrationAddressAm) as value FROM MERCHANTS WHERE ? = MerchantID

fields.title: INN
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT(INN) as value FROM MERCHANTS WHERE ? = MerchantID

fields.title: BankAccount
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT(BankAccount) as value FROM MERCHANTS WHERE ? = MerchantID

fields.title: DirectorName
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT(DirectorName) as value FROM MERCHANTS WHERE ? = MerchantID

fields.title: Phone
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT(Phone) as value FROM MERCHANTS WHERE ? = MerchantID

fields.title: Email
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT(email) as value FROM MERCHANTS WHERE ? = MerchantID

fields.title: TerminalID
fields.lookupQuery: SELECT DISTINCT value_col as value, display_col as display FROM table_name WHERE parent = ?
